str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed within 7 days of forming suspicion. Licensed VASPs supervised by SEC Nigeria are reporting entities under the Money Laundering (Prevention and Prohibition) Act 2022. Filed via NFIU's goAML portal.

ctr.notes: Currency Transaction Reports required for cash transactions of NGN 5,000,000 or more for individuals (NGN 10,000,000 for corporates). Filed within 7 days.
